name: Priner Servicos Industriais S.A.
summary: Priner Servi√É¬ßos Industriais S.A. provides industrial services and rental services in the petrochemical, pulp and paper, steel, offshore, naval, mining and infrastructure sectors in Brazil. The company provides access solution, including scaffolding systems, aluminum flooring, modular aluminum scaffolding systems, rope access, and suspended work platforms; and pressurized habitat solution with safety requirements, such as offshore oil production rigs, refineries and petrochemical plants, and terminals. It also offers thermal insulation solutions for conventional and portable thermal insulation systems, firewalls and acoustic systems, offering maximum productivity and quality; and industrial paintwork, such as anticorrosive protection for the preservation of patrimonial lines, equipment, and metallic structures. Priner Servi√É¬ßos Industriais S.A. was formerly known as Mills SI Servi√É¬ßos Industriais S/A and changed its name to Priner Servi√É¬ßos Industriais S.A. in 2016. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
